phase_name: NeurIPS experiment design (between Phase 1 and Phase 2)

Ground cost economics: per-sample GPT-5 std = $0.206, Qwen = $0.025; 4-stream total = ~$843
Finalize canonical (pass@3 L0 temp=0.7 thinking=ON self-repair=OFF) + ablation (pass@1 L1-L4 same params)

remaining_tasks.name: Gal approves 5 decisions: GPT-5 tier (std vs Pro), Azure quota confirmation from Le, Option D approval, gpt-4.1-mini purge authorization, 2-machine allocation

Apply 4 code changes to scripts/evaluation/llm_evaluate.py: add azure-gpt-5 entry (L94), reasoning_effort=medium (L879), flip Qwen enable_thinking to True (L1001), remove gpt-4.1-2025-04-14 + azure-gpt-4.1 (L82-100)

Update .planning/ROADMAP.md + REQUIREMENTS.md + Phase 2/3 specs to reflect canonical+ablation design (was 2-campaign)
Launch 4 parallel streams (qwen_main, qwen_abl, gpt_main, gpt_abl) on 2 machines

blockers.workaround: Fallback to o3 if quota insufficient

human_actions_pending.context: Need ≥200k TPM sustained; otherwise rate-limiting hits wall-clock

human_actions_pending.context: 4 parallel streams need 2 machines to finish in ~1 day wall clock

decisions.decision: Replace 2-campaign design with canonical (pass@3 L0) + ablation (pass@1 L1-L4)
decisions.rationale: 2-campaign confounds temp × augment × sampling × self-repair; reviewer-fragile for NeurIPS
Open-source + proprietary two-track per 2026-04-15 meeting; remove gpt-4.1-mini (botched results)

decisions.decision: Thinking ON for both models in all runs
decisions.rationale: Meeting-agreed: report best-effort capability; reflects test-time compute scaling norm
Isolates one-shot capability; retries confound LLM ability with error-signal quality

decisions.decision: Full kernel coverage (all 87 TRUE PASS) in both canonical and ablation
decisions.rationale: User preferred over 30-kernel subset; statistical coverage for NeurIPS reviewers

decisions.decision: Derive pass@1 baseline from first canonical sample for apples-to-apples ablation delta
decisions.rationale: Mixed-estimator defense — no extra compute needed

decisions.decision: Total budget ~$843 on GPT-5 standard tier (not Pro ~$9030)
decisions.rationale: 12× cost difference; standard is sufficient for headline result

decisions.decision: 4 independent parallel streams on 2 machines → ~1 day wall clock

next_action: When Gal's approval arrives (likely Apr 17): read ~/.claude/plans/gsd-context-goal-i-cached-finch.md Section 9, act on his 5 decisions, then apply code changes #1-#4 to scripts/evaluation/llm_evaluate.py
